General.Name: The Magnum Ice Cream Company N.V.
General.Description: The Magnum Ice Cream Company N.V. engages in the ice cream business in the Netherlands. The company offers its products under the Magnum, Ben & Jerry's, Cornetto, and Wall's brands. It also operates in rest of Europe, North America, South America, Africa, Asia, the Middle East, Australia, and New Zealand. The company was incorporated in 2025 and is headquartered in Amsterdam, the Netherlands.
